The upcoming fifth season of HBO‘s Emmy-winning crime anthology series True Detective — and the second with Issa Lopez as writer/showrunner — is moving along.
Filming on the new season is slated to begin in the coming months, with casting in preliminary stages."},{"url":"https://www.productionlist.com/production/true-detective-season-5","title":"True Detective (Season 5) | Production List","content":"HBO’s crime anthology returns with a new case set around New York’s Jamaica Bay."},{"url":"https://www.tvinsider.com/1175987/true-detective-season-5-premiere-date-trailer-cast-location-plot-details/","title":"'True Detective' Season 5: Cast, Premiere Date, Location, and More","content":"True Detective Season 5 is taking shape as HBO looks ahead to the future of the anthology drama, with the most recent update surrounding the show’s setting at the HBO slate presentation in November 2025.
True Detective is going a little more urban for its latest story, according to Deadline, which spoke to HBO’s head of drama series, Francesca Orsi, in February 2025.
In an interview with the exec, Orsi said Season 5 will be “set in New York, in Jamaica Bay.” She added, “Issa has a lot to say, not unlike she did with Night Country.
No official casting has been announced at this time, but preliminary casting was reportedly underway, according to a report by Deadline in February 2025.
Since then, the outlet teased that Nicolas Cage is under consideration for a leading role in Season 5, which is reportedly set to begin filming in 2026.
According to Orsi, Season 5 will launch in 2027, with an exact premiere date and month yet to be announced."},{"url":"https://www.joblo.com/true-detective-5-setting/","title":"True Detective season 5 moves the setting to Jamaica Bay, aims for a 2027 premiere","content":"True Detective season 5 moves the setting to Jamaica Bay, aims for a 2027 premiere
Tigers Are Not Afraid filmmaker Issa López, who directed and co-wrote all six episodes of the fourth season of the HBO anthology crime series True Detective (a season that’s known as True Detective: Night Country), is coming back to do another season of the show – and HBO’s Head of Drama Series and Film Francesca Orsi has just revealed the setting for True Detective season 5 to Deadline!
True Detective creator Nic Pizzolatto excited fans with talk of a Cohle/Hart reunion this summer, but Woody Harrelson doesn't want to return."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/tv/news/nicolas-cage-true-detective-season-5-1236444023/","title":"Nicolas Cage to Star in 'True Detective' Season 5","content":"Cage would be the latest high-profile star to take on a leading role in “True Detective.” Leads of past seasons include Matthew McConaughey, Woody Harrelson, Colin Farrell, Rachel McAdams, Mahershala Ali, and Jodie Foster.
Harrelson, McConaughey, Ali, and Foster all earned Emmy nominations for their respective seasons, while Foster won both an Emmy and Golden Globe Award for her work in Season 4.
The show does not have an official release date at the time of this publishing but is slated to debut in 2026.
“True Detective: Night Country.” Issa López is returning as writer and showrunner under her overall deal with HBO.
Per HBO, Season 4 was the most-watched installment of the show to date, with 12.7 million cross platform viewers."}]}
